Name: ID
Description: Record ID (ID): Unique identifier. Cannot be related to participant. It can be used for reference only.

Name: AGE
Description: Age of patient.

Name: SEX
Description: 0: female 1: male

Name: INF_ANAM
Description: Quantity of myocardial infarctions in the anamnesis. 0: zero 1: one 2: two 3: three and more

Name: STENOK_AN
Description: Exertional angina pectoris in the anamnesis. 0: never 1: during the last year 2: one year ago 3: two years ago 4: three years ago 5: 4-5 years ago

Name: FK_STENOK
Description: Functional class (FC) of angina pectoris in the last year. 0: there is no angina pectoris 1: I FC 2: II FC 3: III FC 4: IV FC

Name: IBS_POST
Description: Coronary heart disease (CHD) in recent weeks days before admission to hospital 0: none 1: exertional angina pectoris 2: unstable angina pectoris

Name: IBS_NASL
Description: Heredity on CHD 0: isn't burdened 1: burdened

Name: GB
Description: Presence of an essential hypertension 0: there is no essential hypertension 1: Stage 1 2: Stage 2 3: Stage 3

Name: SIM_GIPERT
Description: Symptomatic hypertension

Name: DLIT_AG
Description: there was no arterial hypertension 1: one year 2: two years 3: three years 4: four years 5: five years 6: 6-10 years 7: more than 10 years

Name: ZSN_A
Description: Presence of chronic Heart failure (HF) in the anamnesis: Partially ordered attribute: there are two lines of severities: 0<1<2<4. 0<1<3<4. State 4 means simultaneous states 2 and 3 0: there is no chronic heart failure 1: I stage 2: II stage (heart failure due to right ventricular systolic dysfunction) 3: II stage (heart failure due to left ventricular systolic dysfunction) 4: IIB stage (heart failure due to left and right ventricular systolic dysfunction)

Name: nr_11
Description: Observing of arrhythmia in the anamnesis

Name: nr_01
Description: Premature atrial contractions in the anamnesis

Name: nr_02
Description: Premature ventricular contractions in the anamnesis

Name: nr_03
Description: Paroxysms of atrial fibrillation in the anamnesis

Name: nr_04
Description: A persistent form of atrial fibrillation in the anamnesis

Name: nr_07
Description: Ventricular fibrillation in the anamnesis

Name: nr_08
Description: Ventricular paroxysmal tachycardia in the anamnesis

Name: np_01
Description: First-degree AV block in the anamnesis

Name: np_04
Description: Third-degree AV block in the anamnesis

Name: np_05
Description: LBBB (anterior branch) in the anamnesis

Name: np_07
Description: Incomplete LBBB in the anamnesis

Name: np_08
Description: Complete LBBB in the anamnesis

Name: np_09
Description: Incomplete RBBB in the anamnesis

Name: np_10
Description: Complete RBBB in the anamnesis

Name: endocr_01
Description: Diabetes mellitus in the anamnesis

Name: endocr_02
Description: Obesity in the anamnesis

Name: endocr_03
Description: Thyrotoxicosis in the anamnesis

Name: zab_leg_01
Description: Chronic bronchitis in the anamnesis

Name: zab_leg_02
Description: Obstructive chronic bronchitis in the anamnesis

Name: zab_leg_03
Description: Bronchial asthma in the anamnesis

Name: zab_leg_04
Description: Chronic pneumonia in the anamnesis

Name: zab_leg_06
Description: Pulmonary tuberculosis in the anamnesis

Name: S_AD_KBRIG
Description: Systolic blood pressure according to Emergency Cardiology Team

Name: D_AD_KBRIG
Description: Diastolic blood pressure according to Emergency Cardiology Team

Name: S_AD_ORIT
Description: Systolic blood pressure according to intensive care unit

Name: D_AD_ORIT
Description: Diastolic blood pressure according to intensive care unit

Name: O_L_POST
Description: Pulmonary edema at the time of admission to intensive care unit

Name: K_SH_POST
Description: Cardiogenic shock at the time of admission to intensive care unit

Name: MP_TP_POST
Description: Paroxysms of atrial fibrillation at the time of admission to intensive care unit (or at a pre-hospital stage)

Name: SVT_POST
Description: Paroxysms of supraventricular tachycardia at the time of admission to intensive care unit (or at a pre-hospital stage)

Name: GT_POST
Description: Paroxysms of ventricular tachycardia at the time of admission to intensive care unit (or at a pre-hospital stage)

Name: FIB_G_POST
Description: Ventricular fibrillation at the time of admission to intensive care unit (or at a pre-hospital stage)

Name: ant_im
Description: Presence of an anterior myocardial infarction (left ventricular) (ECG changes in leads V1: V4 )  0: there is no infarct in this location  1: QRS has no changes  2: QRS is like QR-complex  3: QRS is like Qr-complex  4: QRS is like QS-complex

Name: lat_im
Description: Presence of a lateral myocardial infarction (left ventricular) (ECG changes in leads V5: V6. I AVL) 0: there is no infarct in this location 1: QRS has no changes 2: QRS is like QR-complex 3: QRS is like Qr-complex 4: QRS is like QS-complex

Name: inf_im
Description: Presence of an inferior myocardial infarction (left ventricular) (ECG changes in leads III AVF II). 0: there is no infarct in this location 1: QRS has no changes 2: QRS is like QR-complex 3: QRS is like Qr-complex 4: QRS is like QS-complex

Name: post_im
Description: Presence of a posterior myocardial infarction (left ventricular) (ECG changes in V7: V9 reciprocity changes in leads V1 – V3) 0: there is no infarct in this location 1: QRS has no changes 2: QRS is like QR-complex 3: QRS is like Qr-complex 4: QRS is like QS-complex

Name: IM_PG_P
Description: Presence of a right ventricular myocardial infarction

Description: ECG rhythm at the time of admission to hospital: atrial

Description: ECG rhythm at the time of admission to hospital: sinus with a heart rate above 90 (tachycardia)

Name: ritm_ecg_p_08
Description: ECG rhythm at the time of admission to hospital: sinus with a heart rate below 60 (bradycardia)

Name: TIME_B_S
Description: Time elapsed from the beginning of the attack of CHD to the hospital 1: less than 2 hours 2: 2-4 hours 3: 4-6 hours 4: 6-8 hours 5: 8-12 hours 6: 12-24 hours 7: more than 1 days 8: more than 2 days 9: more than 3 days
